chunks.text: Entrepreneurship Archives - Page 13 of 13 - EECS at Berkeley Entrepreneurship June 12, 2015 CS 61A named among Top 5 CS Classes in the US by Bloomberg Business An article featured in Bloomberg Business titled “Five of the Best Computer Science Classes in the U.S” has named EECS CS 61A in the top 5. The number of college graduates who got degrees in computer science in 2011 was 2,000% higher than it was in 1970 according... March 16, 2015 Steve Wozniak and Yoky Matsuoka receive Distinguished Alumni Awards Two EECS alumni have been chosen to receive distinguished alumni awards by the Cal Alumni Association (CAA). Steve Wozniak, (B.S. EE, ‘86) has been named 2015 Alumnus of the Year.
